# D&D Global AI Surveillance

D&D Global AI Surveillance is a production-ready Security Operations Center (SOC) interface for advanced AI-powered security monitoring and threat detection.

## Features

- **Real-time Camera Monitoring**: Live HLS video streams from surveillance cameras
- **AI Detection**: Automated threat detection using AI and machine learning
- **Incident Management**: Comprehensive incident tracking and response workflow
- **Activity Timeline**: Real-time activity feed showing security events
- **Alarm Response**: Automatic alarm mapping and incident reporting
- **User Management**: Multi-user access with role-based permissions
- **Advanced Filtering**: Smart search with object type, color, and equipment attributes

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: React with Vite build system
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with real-time subscriptions
- **Video Streaming**: HLS.js for live camera feeds
- **Styling**: Custom CSS with cyber/security aesthetic
- **Deployment**: Vercel with automatic CI/CD

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/cameras` - Retrieve camera inventory
- `POST /api/cameras` - Add new camera
- `DELETE /api/cameras` - Remove camera
- `GET /api/incidents` - Get security incidents
- `PATCH /api/incidents/:id/status` - Update incident status
- `GET /api/search/attributes` - Advanced search filters

## Use Cases

This SOC interface is designed for:
- Security operations centers
- Surveillance monitoring teams
- Law enforcement agencies
- Enterprise security departments
- Critical infrastructure protection

## Documentation

For API documentation and integration guides, see the project repository.
